reasoning: The control SI-4(10) focuses on system monitoring with visibility into encrypted communications. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that network policies and service meshes are configured to monitor encrypted traffic. NetworkPolicies can be used to define and enforce traffic rules, while service meshes like Istio or Linkerd can provide visibility into encrypted traffic. Additionally, ensuring that Ingress controllers have TLS monitoring enabled can help achieve this control.
